context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 was a CODE QUALITY REGRESSION test after refactoring. Key changes verified: (1) getToken() centralized in apiClient.js - used by useAudioStream.js and ChatPage.jsx for TTS; (2) useImageUpload.js uses refs pattern to reduce useCallback dependencies; (3) Python test anti-patterns fixed (is True, == True); (4) eslint-disable comments removed from hooks. All features working: Landing page, Problems page (10 cards), Chat with voice selection, TTS audio streaming, Tariffs page (4 cards), Booking calendar.
